title: Actions are by intentions
text: Actions are judged by intentions, and every person will have what they intended.

title: The pillars of Islam
text: Islam is built upon five: testimony of faith, establishing prayer, giving zakah, hajj, and fasting Ramadan.

title: Best to their families
text: The best of you are those who are best to their families.

title: Smiling is charity
text: Your smile for your brother is charity.

title: Allah accepts repentance
text: Allah accepts the repentance of His servant so long as the soul has not reached the throat.

title: Kindness to parents
text: A man asked which deed is best. The Prophet ﷺ mentioned prayer on time, then kindness to parents.

title: Remember the Hereafter
text: Remember often the destroyer of pleasures.

title: Guidance for those able to marry
text: The Prophet ﷺ encouraged young people who were able to marry, and advised fasting for those who were not able.

title: Mercy toward people
text: Allah will not show mercy to those who do not show mercy to people.

title: Care for the neighbor
text: Jibril continued to advise the Prophet ﷺ about the neighbor until he thought the neighbor would be given a share of inheritance.

title: Make matters approachable
text: Make things easy and do not make them difficult; give glad tidings and do not drive people away.

title: The weight of a word
text: A person may speak a word pleasing to Allah without considering its importance, and Allah raises that person because of it.
